info.narration: #0 is sent into $0's containment chamber. This text is shown when you assign work.
[ {mid1 - mid4 are shown during the work}, {If you have multiple of these in one narration tag, a random one will be chosen every work.}, ]
[ {mid1 is shown near the start}, {mid4 is shown near the end}, ]

[ {More about these can be found in the documentation}, {Example text. 2}, {Example text. 3},
]

collection.name: Out of Sight Out of Mind
collection.openText: "I have something I want to tell you."

specialTipSize.specialTip: Successful work completion will cause F-02-152 to tell the employee about another employee's private secret, while blessing the employee holding the secret under a phenomenon dubbed as "Mindful".
[name], who was under the "Mindful" effect, reported about feeling little to no pain from BLACK damage attacks.

If there's already a "Mindful" employee and yet another employee is sent to F-02-152's containment unit to work and successfully completes it, the abnormality will also tell them about the same secret, while cursing the employee holding the same secret under a phenomenon dubbed as "Sightful".
[name], who was under the "Sightful" effect, reported feeling little to no pain from PALE damage attacks.

Both the "Mindful" and "Sightful" employees timely and suddenly would chase after eachother with the intent to kill. Their actions can be stopped with interference from the Manager, coming back to their senses.

If a third different employee is sent to work at F-02-152's containment unit, any and all employees with the "Mindful" or "Sightful" phenomenon died, including the employee that just concluded work with the abnormality.
